ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job market data entry */,
  "work_year" TEXT /* Year of the job data entry */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level (e.g., EN, SE, EX) */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., FT, PT) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the position */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary offered for the position */,
  "salary_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "salary_in_usd" REAL /* Salary converted to USD */,
  "employee_residence" TEXT /* Employee's place of residence */,
  "remote_ratio" INTEGER /* Percentage of remote work allowed */,
  "company_location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the job */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered by the company */,
  "application_link" TEXT /* Link to apply for the job */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the job data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_market_data_company_location FOREIGN KEY ("company_location") REFERENCES company_locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_market_data_salary_currency FOREIGN KEY ("salary_currency") REFERENCES currency_rates ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_market_data_employment_type FOREIGN KEY ("employment_type") REFERENCES employment_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_market_data_experience_level FOREIGN KEY ("experience_level") REFERENCES experience_levels ("level_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_market_data_company_size FOREIGN KEY ("company_size") REFERENCES company_sizes ("size_category")
)

CREATE TABLE "experience_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the experience level (e.g., EN, SE, EX) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experience level */,
  "min_years_experience" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required for the level */,
  "max_years_experience" INTEGER /* Maximum years of experience for the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_types" (
  "employment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment type (e.g., FT, PT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment type */,
  "flexibility" TEXT /* Flexibility of the employment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_rates" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate to USD */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the job title */,
  "career_path" TEXT /* Potential career path for the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remote_work_options" (
  "remote_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the remote work option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the remote work option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the remote work policy */,
  "flexibility" TEXT /* Flexibility of the remote work option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remote_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the company location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the company location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the company location */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the company location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company size category */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Size category (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary history entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job market data entry */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the salary record */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary amount for the specific year */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus or additional compensation */,
  "benefits_value" REAL /* Value of benefits in monetary terms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES job_market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, researcher) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each job market data entry
